examples.name: SaaS Web App — TeamPulse
examples.description: Multi-tenant team-engagement SaaS: subscriptions, SSO, GDPR/SOC2 posture, full delivery pipeline.

examples.name: Internal Tool — OpsDesk
examples.description: VPN-only admin dashboard with SSO, RBAC and an audit log; boring tech on purpose.

examples.name: REST API Service — MetricsHub API
examples.description: Headless public REST API with keys/scopes, rate limiting, versioning, webhooks and usage billing.

examples.name: Marketplace — MakerMarket
examples.description: Two-sided marketplace: listings and search, Stripe Connect payouts, reviews, KYC.

examples.name: Mobile App — FieldNote
examples.description: Offline-first cross-platform field-inspection app with push notifications and biometric login.
